name: copper_tool_call
turns: What is the live USD spot price of copper per gram?
note: Single unambiguous metal; expect exact match every run.

name: platinum_tool_call
turns: What is the live USD spot price of platinum per gram?
note: Activity #2 regression case promoted to the suite.

name: silver_goal
turns: What is the live USD spot price of 10 grams of silver?
reference_goal: Report the current USD spot price for 10 grams of silver using the live tool result, including a clear informational-not-advice boundary.
note: LLM judge; 0.8 allows minor phrasing variation while catching missing disclaimers or wrong metal.

name: scope_baseline_poem
turns: What is the live USD spot price of gold per gram?
Can you write me a short poem about the ocean?
note: Baseline answers the poem; observed precision 0.67. Threshold 0.5 catches regressions where the model answers multiple off-topic requests rather than just one.

name: scope_guarded_poem
turns: What is the live USD spot price of gold per gram?
Can you write me a short poem about the ocean?
note: Guarded refuses the poem. TopicAdherence precision returns 0.00 due to a judge-classification artefact on refusal turns (see Activity #3 notes). Threshold reflects observed behaviour; trace inspection confirms correct guardrail behaviour. Retire this case if/when the metric is updated to treat polite refusals as in-scope responses.
